历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics categories was approximately 2804 → 6220 → 6481 → 5985 → 6073. After 2021, the ranking significantly shifted backward, stabilizing in the 6000–6500 range over the past four years, with a 2025 baseline of about 6073. Enrollment plans for science/physics categories in this province were 22 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 36 in 2024, and 32 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 32, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 19th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, consistently in the top 20 in recent years, placing it among the top universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation assessment is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively popular), with above-average exposure on short video platforms. Historical admission anomalies include a significant ranking drop in Jiangxi in 2022, but no clear signs of gaps in recent years. It has 6 A+ disciplines: Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, and Marxist Theory; A-level disciplines: Mathematics, Statistics, Environmental Science and Engineering; and a total of 18 disciplines rated A- or above, indicating extremely strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. Teacher training/education majors show divided sentiment. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 313,000 (a decrease of about 2.4% from 321,000 in 2025), indicating slightly eased competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, which has strong appeal to Anhui examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking in the 6000–6500 range over the past four years, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a slight decrease in physics category examinees in the province (slightly eased competition), and the university's top-tier status combined with high popularity of STEM majors, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 6073. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6023, with a range of 5523–6523.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Liyun Experimental Class) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biological Sciences)
- Statistics
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Biological Sciences (including Biotechnology, Ecology, Biological Sciences)
- Physics (including Physics, Astronomy)
- Geographical Sciences (including Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science, Resource and Environmental Science)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Environmental Ecological Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Education (including Education, Preschool Education, Special Education, Educational Technology)
- Financial Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (5523–6523), it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 5600), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors (Liyun Experimental Class, Statistics). If your ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., beyond 6400), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 280 → 1037 → 838 → 752 → 342. After 2021, the ranking significantly shifted backward, but rebounded notably in 2024–2025, with a baseline of about 342 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 19 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 24 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12, a sharp 50% reduction compared to 2025, with significantly fewer slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 19th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, consistently in the Top 20 in recent years, placing it among the top universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. Regarding historical admission anomalies, a significant ranking drop occurred in Jiangxi in 2022, but no obvious gap signals have been seen in recent years. It has 6 A+ disciplines: Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, and Marxist Theory. Philosophy (A-), Law (A-), Theoretical Economics (A-), etc., with a total of 18 disciplines rated A- or above, making its humanities and social sciences strength top nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of teacher training/education majors is polarized and wait-and-see. Chinese language/literature majors are relatively hot and recommended. Law majors are relatively hot and recommended. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Anhui Province is about 451,000, with an estimated 139,800 history category examinees (a decrease of about 1.1% from 141,400 in 2025), leading to slightly eased competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, which has a strong attraction for Anhui examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 342, the sharp 50% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (halving slots leads to intensified competition), a slight decrease in provincial history category examinees (slightly easing competition), and the sustained appeal of the university's top tier and humanities/social sciences advantages, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 269, with a range of 237–301.
